use rayon::prelude::*;
use std::sync::Arc;

struct RuleCatalog {
    rules: Vec<Rule>,
    patterns: Vec<Pattern>,
    config: Config,
}

// BAD: heavy clone per item in parallel closure
fn lint_files(files: &[PathBuf], catalog: &RuleCatalog) -> Vec<LintResult> {
    files.par_iter()
        .map(|file| {
            let catalog_clone = catalog.clone(); // expensive clone
            let content = std::fs::read_to_string(file).unwrap();
            lint_with_catalog(&content, &catalog_clone)
        })
        .collect()
}

fn process_with_context(items: &[Item], ctx: &Context) -> Vec<Output> {
    items.par_iter()
        .map(|item| {
            let ctx_clone = ctx.clone(); // clones large state
            process_item(item, &ctx_clone)
        })
        .collect()
}
